    local _ = MainFeatures_2:NewToggle("Noclip", "Go Through Things, Use Infinite Jump With it", function(p1_0, p2_0)
        Env.noclip = function(p1_0)
            local RunService_4 = game:GetService("RunService");
            local Connection_6;
            Connection_6 = RunService_2.Stepped:connect(function(Time_3) -- args: Time_4, DeltaTime_2;
                local var406 = wait(0.21);
            end);
        end;
        Env.clip = function(p1_0, p2_0, p3_0, p4_0, p5_0)
            local var405 = (Connection_6 and 15131598); -- 15131598
            Connection_6:Disconnect()

        local Connection_5;
        Connection_5 = RunService_2.Stepped:Connect(function(Time) -- args: Time_2, DeltaTime;
            local var405 = wait(0.21);
        end);
    end)

local Connection_2
Connection_2 = CopyButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function(X_3) -- args: X_4, Y_2
    local setclipboard = Env.setclipboard
    setclipboard(TextBoxDisplay.Text)
    local StarterGui = game:GetService("StarterGui")
end)
local Connection_3
Connection_3 = JoinButton.MouseButton1Down:Connect(function(X_5, Y_3, p3_0, p4_0) -- args: X_6, Y_4
    setclipboard("https://discord.gg/dtQKPPCyfK")
    game:GetService("StarterGui")
    StarterGui:SetCore("SendNotification", {
        Text = "Copied Discord link to clipboard!",
        Title = "Discord",
        Duration = 5,
    })
end)
